name: LimaCharlie
description: LimaCharlie — Security infrastructure-as-code platform providing EDR, detection rules, and telemetry pipeline as API primitives.

seo.title: LimaCharlie — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: LimaCharlie: LimaCharlie — Security infrastructure-as-code platform providing EDR, detection rules, and telemetry pipeline as API primitives.

when_to_use: EDR-as-code for custom threat detection rule deployment
Security telemetry pipeline for SIEM and SOAR integration
Detection engineering workflow with YAML-based sigma rules
Incident response automation via LimaCharlie replay engine
Managed detection and response infrastructure for MSSPs

pros: Pay-per-use pricing beats flat SIEM seat licenses
API-first design lets you wire detection into existing stacks
Transparent sensor code and open detection rule format
Fast sensor deployment across Windows, Mac, and Linux
cons: Requires engineering to build what other EDRs give out of box
Fewer pre-built detections than commercial competitors
Steeper learning curve for non-programmer analysts
Support model is self-serve heavy for lower tiers
review.verdict: Infra-as-code EDR for teams that want to build, not buy; a bad fit if you need turnkey SOC tooling.
review.best_for: Security-engineering teams and MSSPs building custom detection pipelines and tooling.
review.not_for: Small SOCs wanting pre-packaged detections and managed response out of the box.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
